text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After talking with Smart Falcon, we decide to
take a relaxing trip to a local beach (though we
wish it was Dubai). Eishin Flash seems skeptical at
first...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But after Smart Falcon and I encourage her,
Eishin Flash begins to wonder if choosing the easy
path was the right thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To give her one last push and help her truly face
herself, I arrange a rematch for her with Mr. C.B.
